judgment.summary: Alibaba shows strong earnings growth and a low forward P/E, but faces challenges with negative operating margins and free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by 89.2%; next earnings date is 2026-05-13.
positives: Earnings growth 100.5% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 103.4% indicate strong recent performance.
Forward P/E of 14.07 and PEG ratio of 0.46 suggest the stock is undervalued relative to its growth prospects.
Analyst consensus is a strong buy with a high mean target price of $191.04.
Total cash of $316.89B provides significant liquidity.
negatives: Operating margin is negative at -0.3%, indicating core operations are not profitable.
Free cash flow is negative at $-46.51B TTM, suggesting cash burn.
Revenue growth of 2.9% YoY is modest.
Last quarter's EPS significantly missed estimates by 89.2%.

news.paragraph: Alibaba Group Holding Limited (BABA) is seeing positive analyst sentiment with Benchmark reaffirming a Buy rating following its AI cloud expansion. Additionally, notable investor Michael Burry has opened a new position in the stock. While these developments are encouraging, traders should note that the recent headlines also include unrelated news about Apple and NVIDIA, which could influence broader market sentiment.

headlines.title: Apple Inc. (AAPL) Targets $15B Service Revenue via AI

Alibaba Group Holding Limited (BABA): Michael Burry Opens New Position
Benchmark Reaffirms Buy Rating on Alibaba (BABA) Following AI Cloud Expansion
